title: hyoseris muricata
intro: Hyoseris muricata, also known as mouse-ear or mouse ear, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hyoseris muricata include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
